description: Southern Cross Gold Consolidated Ltd. engages in the acquisition and exploration of precious and energy mineral interests in Australia. The company explores for gold, antimony, iron oxide, and copper deposits. Its flagship property is the 100% owned Sunday Creek project covering an area of 19,365 hectares of granted exploration tenements located north of Melbourne in Victoria. The company is based in Melbourne, Australia.
